description:
The oai-runner's `search_files` tool implementation does a naive `grep -rn` from the project root without excluding build directories (`target/`, `.git/`, `node_modules/`, etc.). This causes it to hang for minutes scanning gigabytes of compiled artifacts.

Observed: `grep -rn --color=never -E planning_shared\.rs /Users/samishukri/ao-cli/.` ran for 4+ minutes stuck in `target/`.

**Preferred fix**: Switch to `rg` (ripgrep) which respects `.gitignore` by default, providing automatic exclusion of `target/`, `.git/`, `node_modules/`, and any other gitignored paths. If `rg` is not available, fall back to `grep` with `--exclude-dir` flags for common large directories.

Key file: `crates/oai-runner/` — find the search_files tool implementation and make search gitignore-aware.
title: Fix oai-runner search_files tool to exclude target/ and .git/ directories
